scripts.install-app: echo "Building Coach v$npm_package_version" && tauri build && pkill -x coach || true && rm -rf /Applications/Coach.app && cp -R target/release/bundle/macos/Coach.app /Applications/Coach.app && mdimport /Applications/Coach.app && ln -sf /Applications/Coach.app/Contents/MacOS/coach ~/.local/bin/coach && coach --version
